title: Get in touch | Abena Oppong-Asare MP
headings: h2: Sign-up to receive Monthly Newsletters
h3: Please sign up below to receive monthly e-newsletters, in which you will find updates on local campaigns, my work in Parliament and events taking place near you.

h3: You can contact me about your ideas, issues or concerns in a number of ways. In all correspondence you must ensure you provide your full name, address and telephone number, as I can only deal with constituents who reside in Erith and Thamesmead.
h3: Please review our Privacy statement for more information on how your data will be processed.
h3: Here for Erith and Thamesmead
text_excerpt: Get in touch | Abena Oppong-Asare MP Facebook Twitter Mail Instagram Youtube Home About Abena Latest news Monthly Newsletters In Parliament Maiden Speech Thamesmead’s Pride in Place Survey Campaign Summer School 2026 In the community Southeastern Campaign Cost of Living Help Next Stop Thamesmead Events Sign up to a ‘Meet your MP’ Coffee Morning with Abena Annual Christmas Card Competition Get in touch Search Get in Touch Member of Parliament E-mail: abena.oppongasare.mp@parliament.uk For security reasons all post for Abena must be sent directly to the parliamentary address. Parliamentary address: Abena Oppong-Asare MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Telephone The office phones are operated Monday to Friday, 10 – 12pm and 2 – 4pm. Casework Queries: 01322 342991 Press & Parliamentary Queries: 0207 219 4892 Social Media Abena is active on social media and you can visit her page on Facebook and Twitter . It is not possible to respond to individual online comments, tweets or direct private messages so you will need to contact the office in the way set out on this page. Sign-up to receive Monthly Newsletters Please sign up below to receive monthly e-newsletters, in which you will find updates on local campaigns, my work in Parliament and events taking place near you. Subscribe * indicates required First Name Last Name Email Address * Postcode e-mail updates I consent to receiving e-mail updates on local news and campaigns from Abena Your details will not be shared with any third parties for marketing purposes and you can unsubscribe at any time. For details please read our privacy policy. Contact Form You can contact me about your ideas, issues or concerns in a number of ways. In all correspondence you must ensure you provide your full name, address and telephone number, as I can only deal with constituents who reside in Erith and Thamesmead. Please review our Privacy statement for more information on how your data will be processed. Contact form: Here for Erith and Thamesmead Through my work I am determined to work with local residents, community groups, businesses and public services to ensure that Erith and Thamesmead is put on the map and we get a fair deal for our community.
